name: TURN Server (coturn)
description: Self-hosted TURN relay for WebRTC voice chat. Enables NAT traversal for remote companion access when STUN alone is not sufficient.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: TURN_SECRET
env_vars.description: Shared secret for generating time-limited TURN credentials (HMAC-based)

env_vars.name: TURN_EXTERNAL_IP
env_vars.description: Public IP address of this machine (required for NAT traversal). Leave empty for LAN-only use.

notes: Optional for Tailscale-only deployments (STUN is sufficient). Required when users connect from restrictive networks (corporate NAT, mobile carriers). The companion gateway generates time-limited credentials via /api/turn-credentials using the shared secret.
